en: Hello father, let's get you some place warm, yeah, yeah, remember me?
ko: 안녕하세요 아버지, 따뜻한 곳으로 가요, 네, 저를 기억하시죠?
ja: お父さん、暖かい場所に行きましょう、覚えてますか？
zhTW: 老爸，我們帶你去暖和的地方，記得我嗎？
vi: Cha oi, chung ta di cho am hon nhe, nho con khong?

en: Sir, are you the one who brought the old man in? Mm-hmm, how is he?
ja: すみません、老人を連れてきたのはあなたですか？
zhTW: 請問，是你帶那位老人來的嗎？
vi: Xin loi, ban la nguoi dua ong cu vao day phai khong?

en: Well, he just passed away. What did he die of?
He was just old, it was just his time.
ko: 그냥 나이가 많아서, 때가 된 거죠.
ja: ただ老衰です。寿命でした。
zhTW: 他就是老了，是他的時候到了。
vi: Ong ay chi la gia, da den luc cua ong ay.

en: I want to see his chart, excuse me.
ja: カルテを見せてください、すみません。
zhTW: 我要看他的病歷，不好意思。
vi: Toi muon xem ho so cua ong ay, xin loi.

en: Sir, sir you can't come in here, sir this is a restricted area.
ja: お客様、ここには入れません。
zhTW: 先生，先生，你不能進來這裡。
vi: Thua ong, ong khong the vao day.
